commit_scope: Fix the BML native ideas resonance route after post-merge deploy verification exposed a Rust Postgres parameter serialization failure.

local_validation.notes: The patched BML front-door source compiles and serves /api/health through the Rust native kernel. The ideas resonance SQL no longer reuses $1 as double precision; the query now uses $4::double precision with a Form float argument.

ci_validation.notes: PR checks will run after push.

deploy_validation.notes: Hostinger Auto Deploy failed after PR #2954 because /api/ideas/resonance returned 503 with error serializing parameter 0. This follow-up splits the mixed int/float SQL placeholder into separate native parameters.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: GET /api/ideas/resonance?limit=2 should return 200 from X-Form-Router: native-kernel with X-Form-Handler: api_ideas_resonance instead of 503 persistence serialization failure.
test_flows: Hostinger Auto Deploy: BML front-door promoted read routes

phase_gate.notes: Pending local proof, PR CI, and post-merge deploy verification.
